positive: A maximalist, ethereal print featuring intricate celestial bodies, stylized crescent moons, constellations, and deep flora, such as bioluminescent ferns and interwoven jungle vines. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, optimized for textile printing. Use a limited, high-contrast palette dominated by deep indigo, antique gold foil accents, emerald green, and creamy parchment tones. Focus on clean, strong silhouettes and geometric patterns integrated with organic lines. Graphic novel style meets Art Nouveau elegance. Studio lighting setup, vector illustration quality, suitable for screen printing, highly detailed, flat graphic depth.
negative: blurry, messy, photorealism, watermark, signature, logo, text, words, out of focus, extra limbs, extra fingers, bad anatomy, ugly, noise, low detail, cropped, jpeg artifacts, cartoon, anime
